commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because this is an open member-authored automation PR with no narrow patch defect for ClawSweeper to repair.; Cleared: The diff does not change command parsing, dependency sources, permissions, secret handling, or sandbox boundaries; it only broadens an existing validation-repair retry path behind the existing filters. (sha=9e4c808376ed0aa2e50a7e1c092678d62ffe0003)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the same-diagnostic-set exclusion from the `pnpm check:changed` validation-repair retry gate and updates the executor regression fixture to assert the repair prompt receives unchanged eligible diagnostics on touched files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main returns false for an eligible failed baseline when `sameDiagnosticSet` is true, so unchanged diagnostics on a touched file are not retried. I did not run the local test suite because this review is read-only, but the PR’s live CI log shows the relevant executor tests passed.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because this is an open member-authored automation PR with no narrow patch defect for ClawSweeper to repair.
